Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Razael]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Soulsmith ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 5''' — Razael is known as the Wolf.}}

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 21''' — Razael's Sword was designed for the execution of Judges and Class One threats.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 22''' — Razael is a Judge.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 18''' — Razael is a being that can match Makiel in combat.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 21''' — Razael is a Judge known as the Wolf.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 22''' — Razael clashed swords with the Mad King.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 25''' — Razael is a Judge who can match Ozriel in open combat.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 1''' — Razael wields a blazing sword.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 6''' — Razael has fighters.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
